room_4877bdef.visualPrompt: A cluttered, gritty cyberpunk pawn shop interior, shelves packed with salvaged robotic arms and glowing cybernetic eyes, dusty glass display counters, dim neon sign lighting, industrial aesthetic, cinematic lighting, high detail, realistic textures.
room_4877bdef.name: Second-Chance Cybernetics
room_4877bdef.description: A cramped, dimly lit storefront cluttered with glass display cases containing salvaged robotic limbs, flickering ocular implants, and tangled nerve-interface cables. The air smells of ozone and industrial cleaning solvent, while a weary technician works behind a workbench covered in soldering irons and diagnostic pads.

room_ea90afda.visualPrompt: Cinematic wide shot of a narrow, dark urban alleyway at night, overflowing with metallic dumpsters and piles of trash, multiple spindly multi-limbed scavenger robots with glowing optic sensors rummaging through garbage, gritty textures, cold industrial lighting, cyberpunk aesthetic, mundane atmosphere.
room_ea90afda.name: The Scavenger's Alley
room_ea90afda.description: A cramped, claustrophobic corridor choked with overflowing dumpsters and heaps of industrial refuse. Small, spindly robotic scavengers move with twitchy, jerky motions, their sensor lights flickering as they sift through the grime for salvageable scraps.
